fields.label: Enable ERP Sync
fields.description: Enable synchronization between PIM and ERPNext Item DocType

fields.label: Auto Create Variant from Item
fields.description: Automatically create PIM product variants when ERPNext Item variants are created

fields.label: Sync Direction
fields.options:
PIM to ERP
ERP to PIM
Bidirectional
fields.description: Direction of data synchronization between PIM and ERP

fields.label: Sync on Save
fields.description: Automatically sync data when a product is saved

fields.label: Default Channel
fields.description: Default distribution channel for new products

fields.label: Auto Publish to Default Channel
fields.description: Automatically publish products to the default channel when marked as ready

fields.label: Default Export Format
fields.description: Default format for product data exports

fields.label: Enable AI Enrichment
fields.description: Enable AI-powered product description generation and attribute extraction

fields.label: AI Provider
fields.options:
OpenAI
Anthropic
Google Gemini
Azure OpenAI
fields.description: Select the AI provider for enrichment tasks

fields.label: AI API Key
fields.description: API key for the selected AI provider (stored encrypted)

fields.label: AI Model
fields.description: Specific model to use (e.g., gpt-4, claude-3-opus)

fields.label: Require Approval for AI Content
fields.description: Require human approval before applying AI-generated content

fields.label: Enable Quality Scoring
fields.description: Calculate and display data quality scores for products

fields.label: Minimum Quality Score
fields.description: Minimum quality score required for publishing

fields.label: Block Publish Below Minimum
fields.description: Prevent publishing products that fall below the minimum quality score

fields.label: Auto Scan on Save
fields.description: Automatically scan for data quality issues when products are saved

fields.label: Enable GS1 Validation
fields.description: Validate GTINs and other GS1 identifiers

fields.label: Company GLN
fields.description: Global Location Number for your organization

fields.label: GS1 Data Pool
fields.description: GDSN data pool for product synchronization

fields.label: Data Pool API Key
fields.description: API key for GDSN data pool integration (stored encrypted)

fields.label: Auto Generate Thumbnails
fields.description: Automatically generate thumbnail images when media is uploaded

fields.label: Thumbnail Size (px)
fields.description: Maximum dimension for generated thumbnails

fields.label: Max Image Size (MB)
fields.description: Maximum allowed image file size in megabytes

fields.label: Allowed Image Formats
fields.description: Comma-separated list of allowed image file extensions
